title: Neon Tic-Tac-Toe
author: Artem (Student)
description: Play classic Tic-Tac-Toe against a smart AI with sleek neon visuals and smooth transitions.

title: Crypto Miner Clicker
author: Sofia (Student)
description: Click to mine virtual coins, buy upgrades, and build your mining empire in this retro idle game.

title: Student Game Template
author: Teacher (Instruction)
description: Learn how to structure your game code, handle session state variables, and design UI elements for the Hub.

title: Buggy Test Game
author: Tester (Debug)
description: An intentionally bugged game to demonstrate the Game Hub's glowing cyberpunk error diagnostic console.
